name: Monitor App and Send Alerts
description: Monitors a specific app for notifications/updates and sends alerts via WhatsApp

steps.goal: Open the app. Navigate to notifications or updates section. Use read_screen to scroll through and collect all new notifications or updates. Copy the collected information to clipboard.
Check if clipboard contains meaningful content (not empty). If there are new notifications, proceed to WhatsApp.
Search for contact 'YOUR_NAME_HERE'. Open the chat. Type '🔔 App Alert:' followed by a newline. Paste the notifications from clipboard. Use submit_message to send.
